content: Does #12358 by @Jan van Mansum fix it? It's coming soon in 6.11.

Thanks @Philip Durbin 🚀 , so I already tried the same in our local environment with 6.8. It enables multipart uploads and downloads both and Openstack Swift S3 (S3 compatible storage) doesn't support multipart downloads.
Hmm, that's the only fix I'm aware of for 6.11. Do you want to create an issue?
Let me confirm it with Openstack S3 side and I will create issue with more details.
Perfect. Thanks! And sorry for the trouble!
I added the comment on that PR. It's more of an S3-compatible storage issue after that change.
Bikram has marked this topic as resolved.
